title: penstemon subserratus
intro: Penstemon subserratus, also known as the serrate beardtongue, is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. This perennial herb has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including inflammation and respiratory problems, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's medicinal properties make it beneficial for reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and soothing skin irritations. Penstemon subserratus can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to harness its health benefits.
